auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Geocodio API key used as the api_key query parameter. Create or manage it at https://dash.geocod.io/apikey.

actions.name: batch_reverse_geocode
actions.description: Reverse geocode multiple coordinate pairs in one batch request and return Geocodio batch results.

coordinates.description: The coordinate strings to reverse geocode in one batch request.

fields.description: A comma-separated list of Geocodio data append codes.

limit.description: The maximum number of results per coordinate.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for batch reverse geocoding coordinate pairs with Geocodio.

query.description: The original query string from the batch request.

additionalProperties.description: A property value in a JSON-like object.

response.description: A JSON-like object with arbitrary string keys.

items.description: One batch geocoding or reverse geocoding result.

outputSchema.description: The Geocodio response for a batch geocoding request.

actions.name: geocode_batch
actions.description: Geocode multiple addresses in one batch request and return Geocodio batch results.

addresses.description: The address strings to geocode in one batch request.

fields.description: A comma-separated list of Geocodio data append codes.

limit.description: The maximum number of results per address.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for batch geocoding addresses with Geocodio.

query.description: The original query string from the batch request.

additionalProperties.description: A property value in a JSON-like object.

response.description: A JSON-like object with arbitrary string keys.

items.description: One batch geocoding or reverse geocoding result.

outputSchema.description: The Geocodio response for a batch geocoding request.

actions.name: single_geocode
actions.description: Geocode a single address and return the official Geocodio response payload.

q.description: The full address string to geocode.

city.description: The city name used for the lookup.

state.description: The state or province code used for the lookup.

postal_code.description: The postal or ZIP code used for the lookup.

country.description: The country context for the lookup.

county.description: The county name used for the lookup.

fields.description: A comma-separated list of Geocodio data append codes.

limit.description: The maximum number of results to return.

format.description: Return Geocodio's simplified single-result response format.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for geocoding a single address with Geocodio.

additionalProperties.description: A property value in a JSON-like object.

input.description: A JSON-like object with arbitrary string keys.

location.description: Latitude and longitude returned by Geocodio.

accuracy.description: The match accuracy score from 0.0 to 1.0.

accuracy_type.description: The Geocodio accuracy type for the match.

source.description: The source dataset for the match.

additionalProperties.description: A property value in a JSON-like object.

address_components.description: A JSON-like object with arbitrary string keys.

additionalProperties.description: A property value in a JSON-like object.

fields.description: A JSON-like object with arbitrary string keys.

lat.description: The latitude returned by Geocodio simple format.

lng.description: The longitude returned by Geocodio simple format.

address.description: The address returned by Geocodio simple format.

source.description: The source returned by Geocodio simple format.

outputSchema.description: The Geocodio response for a single geocode or reverse geocode request.

actions.name: single_reverse_geocode
actions.description: Reverse geocode a single latitude and longitude pair and return the official Geocodio response payload.

fields.description: A comma-separated list of Geocodio data append codes.

limit.description: The maximum number of results to return.

format.description: Return Geocodio's simplified single-result response format.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for reverse geocoding a single latitude and longitude pair.

additionalProperties.description: A property value in a JSON-like object.

input.description: A JSON-like object with arbitrary string keys.

location.description: Latitude and longitude returned by Geocodio.

accuracy.description: The match accuracy score from 0.0 to 1.0.

accuracy_type.description: The Geocodio accuracy type for the match.

source.description: The source dataset for the match.

additionalProperties.description: A property value in a JSON-like object.

address_components.description: A JSON-like object with arbitrary string keys.

additionalProperties.description: A property value in a JSON-like object.

fields.description: A JSON-like object with arbitrary string keys.

lat.description: The latitude returned by Geocodio simple format.

lng.description: The longitude returned by Geocodio simple format.

address.description: The address returned by Geocodio simple format.

source.description: The source returned by Geocodio simple format.

outputSchema.description: The Geocodio response for a single geocode or reverse geocode request.
